goal: ZoneComposer generates MOD tracks that classify into target zones with ≥90% accuracy using locked Phase 4.6 configuration

zone_validate_wrapper.description: Convenience wrapper that hardcodes --force-rhythm-baseline and prints a clean summary table

batch_generator.usage: python zone_batch_generator.py --zone X --count N --outdir DIR --seed-base K

research_brief_path_c.topic: BPM extraction artifact mechanism, gate dependence, waveform tests, remediation options

demo_pack.contents: One MOD track per zone (1–9) generated with Phase 4.6 overrides

path_c_summary.artifact: Librosa beat_track selects false high-BPM candidate (~165 BPM) for certain zone/gate combinations
path_c_summary.root_cause: Square-wave arpeggio onset envelope has strong harmonics at 2×/3× true tempo (125 BPM), fooling tempo inference
path_c_summary.gate_dependence: Zone 6: most gates fail; Zone 4: mostly robust
path_c_summary.waveform_test: Triangle eliminates artifact but breaks other features; square/sawtooth both show artifact
remediation: Option A (onset comb filtering) for future elegant fix
path_c_summary.real_music_impact: Negligible — real music extracts BPM reliably

next_steps: Use zone-validate.py for all future production validation sweeps
Consider Path C Option A if baseline flag becomes undesirable
